name: Cat-C orthogonal-real fixes
rationale: M4 closed all FIX-disposition Cat-C entries from M1-orthogonal-real-failures.json EXCEPT 2 entries that root-caused to regressions introduced by prior milestones (vuln-migration-v1 + field_access_info-v1). Per dispatch-contract validator mandate operator_escalation_on_regression_from_prior_milestone, those 2 entries must NOT be silently fixed in M4 because the fix would require modifying active subcmd handler code (crates/tldr-core/src/security/taint.rs source/sink banks) that is OUTSIDE M4's named exception list, AND because regression-class issues should trigger a milestone-revert decision by the operator.

named_exception_files_modified.change_summary: git_log + git_log_numstat treat 'does not have any commits yet' stderr (empty repo) as Ok(empty) per dispatch-contract M4 named exception list.
analyze_dead_code returns Ok(empty Report) on empty input/no-language detection.
compute_martin_metrics returns Ok(empty Report) on empty input/no-language detection.
parse_coverage accepts directory paths (auto-discovers known coverage filenames); returns Ok(empty) when no coverage file found.

Removed else_clause from cognitive complexity base_increment match per SonarSource Cognitive Complexity v1.4 spec; added is_else_if check so `else if` (if_statement under else_clause) keeps +1 base with no nesting penalty.

delete_on_stale: test_kotlin_returns_unsupported (Kotlin now supported via tree_sitter_kotlin_ng; replacement test_kotlin_parse exists)
test_swift_returns_unsupported (Swift now supported via tree_sitter_swift; replacement test_swift_parse exists)
test_search_with_extension_filter (legacy --ext flag; SmartSearch has no extension filter)
Note: 5 above are inline #[cfg(test)] mod tests inside cli_search_context_tests.rs replaced by a documenting comment block.

operator_options: Option A: relabel both tests as Cat-B carry-forwards (raise stop-threshold from 33 to 35).
Option B: open a new atomic milestone (e.g. vuln-migration-v1.1) to fix the Python f-string-as-HtmlOutput sink + Ruby gets-as-UserInput source regressions, then close M4.
Option C: revert vuln-migration-v1 / field_access_info-v1 portions that introduced the regression, then re-attempt their work.

cargo_test_workspace_features_semantic_n.summary: 35 failed (33 Cat-B vuln-source-parity-v1 carry-forwards + 2 escalated regressions). All ~1900 other tests pass.

validator_mandate_compliance.no_test_gaming_rule: PASS — zero #[ignore] markers added; assertions corrected to match post-fix correct behavior or the SonarSource Cognitive Complexity v1.4 spec; no commented-out code; no weakened assertions.
validator_mandate_compliance.no_source_changes_in_active_subcmd_imple: PASS — source modifications restricted to (a) named exceptions: cognitive analyzer, parse_coverage, analyze_dead_code, compute_martin_metrics, git_log; (b) test fixtures (test files, #[cfg(test)] mods, fixture data files). Two regressions that would have required active-subcmd-handler changes were ESCALATED instead of silently fixed.
validator_mandate_compliance.pre_publish_baseline_restored: PARTIAL — failure-count is 35, target is 33. The +2 are documented escalations awaiting operator decision per the operator_escalation_on_regression_from_prior_milestone validator mandate.
validator_mandate_compliance.cli_output_shape_unchanged: PASS — no CLI public-API surface changes; all source changes are internal handler edge-cases (named exceptions only).
validator_mandate_compliance.operator_escalation_on_regression_from_p: TRIGGERED — reports/operator-escalation-regression.json created with full diagnosis of vuln-migration-v1 and field_access_info-v1 regressions affecting 2 tests.

next_steps: Operator review of reports/operator-escalation-regression.json to choose between Option A (Cat-B relabel + stop-threshold raise to 35), Option B (new milestone for regression fix), or Option C (revert).
Once decided, M5 (CHANGELOG + local tag workspace-test-infrastructure-v1) can proceed.
